base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: improve selected objective by changing entry quality/profile selection without starving trades
expected_effect: Should add one or two charm_wall_breakaway_long trades or recover leader-like net profit while preserving its convex 12-point target behavior. Reject if profile PnL/exposure falls below roughly 225, total net profit drops below 98% of run_001, completed trades fall, or worst MAE worsens beyond -527.
label: charm-wall-admission-probe
rationale: Choose exactly one legal family: batch_d_charm_wall_breakaway_long. Take-profit is saturated and the exact charm-wall exit-compression test already hurt, so this avoids TP keys entirely and tests admission geometry only. The profile is small-sample but high quality, and the strategist explicitly favors expanding charm_wall_breakaway_long through confirmed entries rather than reducing exits. This is not a global filter, not a stop-loss, and not missing-0DTE tuning.
strategy_plan_next_experiments: Dormant Charm Pin Avoid Activation Holdout
